DESCRIPTION: When this card appears, it randomly selects and records 1 #rRed , 1 #bBlue , 1 #gGreen , and 1 #pPurple card on itself. NL When a #yComposite card is Upgraded, the recorded cards are also Upgraded.
Grants different effects while in different #yForms , and #yComposite cards will also change to the corresponding #yForm . Automatically exits at the end of the turn.
